note: FAKE-DATA-ONLY pack. This matrix defines rules; it does not enforce them at runtime.

environments.name: local_fake
environments.notes: Reusable snapshot allowed only if clean (fake data, no secrets).

environments.name: dry_run
environments.notes: Everything in dry_run is fictional. Reusable snapshot allowed only if clean.

environments.name: pilot_prelaunch
environments.description: Real pilot is likely or approved, but before live traffic.
allowed_data: real .env stored only on private deployment machine
environments.real_env_file_allowed: only outside GitHub on the private deployment machine
environments.reusable_snapshot_allowed: only if it contains no real data or secrets
environments.notes: Restricted test runs only. No live autonomous behavior.

environments.name: pilot_live_restricted
environments.description: Restricted live pilot use, only after Blake approval.
allowed_data: real pilot .env on the client-specific VPS only
forbidden_data: reusable template snapshots containing real pilot data
environments.secrets_allowed: Class 2 on pilot-specific deployment machine only; Class 3 with Blake approval
environments.real_env_file_allowed: only on the pilot-specific VPS / deployment machine
environments.outbound_actions_allowed: blocked unless separately approved by Blake
environments.approval_required: Blake approval required to enter; outbound actions need separate approval
environments.notes: Metadata-only tracing unless Blake approves otherwise. Pilot-specific snapshots allowed only as labeled, sensitive, never-reused artifacts.

environments.name: human_only
environments.description: System must not execute agent/tool behavior; humans operate.
environments.secrets_allowed: existing secrets remain in place but are not used by agents
environments.real_env_file_allowed: unchanged in place; not used by agents
environments.notes: Can be entered immediately whenever a safety concern appears.

environments.name: incident_mode
environments.description: Something must be paused, reviewed, preserved, restored, or investigated.
environments.secrets_allowed: frozen in place; no new secrets created
environments.notes: Evidence must be preserved. Incident copies are sensitive and never reused as templates.
